items.author: @AnthropicAI
items.text: The J-space lets us read, audit, and shape what Claude is actively thinking about—useful tools for keeping models trustworthy as they grow more capable. items.author: @HuggingPapers
items.text: DataComp-VLM A massive benchmark for data-centric VLM training. 160 datasets, 6T tokens, and a key result: the right data mix beats filtering, enabling an 8B model to hit 63.6% accuracy (+5.4pp over FineVision).

items.author: @fchollet
items.text: Reporting benchmark results as a scalar number, e.g. "75% on XYZ" is completely meaningless at this point. You should always report efficiency scores, e.g. "75% at a cost per task of $10."
items.title: Reporting benchmark results as a scalar number, e.g. "75% on XYZ" is completely meaningless at this …
items.whyItMatters: 强调基准必须报告效率成本，而非单一准确率数字。
items.summary: Reporting benchmark results as a scalar number, e.g. "75% on XYZ" is completely meaningless at this point. You should always report efficiency scores, e.g. "75% at a cost per task of $10."

items.author: @PrimeIntellect
items.text: Today, prime-rl gets a first-class Algorithms layer — the first step toward making it the most expressive RL codebase. Six algorithms ship built-in: GRPO, MaxRL, OPD, OPSD, SFT, and ECHO. Bringing your own algorithm is writing one file, not rewriting trainer internals.

items.author: @RedHat_AI
items.text: Claude Code and Codex are great interfaces. But they send requests to a third-party LLM by default. Token limits, data privacy, model deprecations like Fable and Mythos. Here's how to fix it: deploy Nemotron or Mistral (or any other open source model) on OpenShift AI with @vllm_project

Here's how to fix it: deploy Nemotron or Mistral (or any other open source model) on OpenShift AI with @vllm_project

items.author: @ostrisai
items.text: Training Wan 2.1-1.3B to use Qwen3-VL-2B text encoder. Doing 33% text only, 33% VL only, and 33% both. Just pretraining the two text input linear layers for now. It is amazing how quickly a model can adapt to a different text encoder. This is 25,750 steps, BS of 10.

items.author: @RekaAILabs
items.text: World models are increasingly central to how agents learn and plan. Today we're releasing WorldModelGym, a benchmark built around a single question: if an agent uses a world model to choose among actions, does it pick the right one? We call this decision-based fidelity. 100+ tracks across Atari, Meta-World, DeepMind Co

items.author: @matei_zaharia
items.text: Anything easy to verify is what agents will do best at! Kernel engineering is fairly easy to verify because kernels run fast (so you can attempt lots of versions), they're fairly simple to test numerically, and there is a clear, continuous objective function (speed).

roundup.title: Hy3, DeepSeek V4 & Fable 5 Drop in One Day
roundup.subtitle: 295B MoE、1M上下文与世界模型实时对战同日亮相
headline: @TencentHunyuan 发布 295B MoE 的 Hy3，Apache 2.0 开源并原生支持 vLLM，@vllm_project 与 @NousResearch 同步验证其工具调用与推理能力。@OpenRouter 数据显示 DeepSeek V4 已达每周 6.6T tokens 领先量级。
@claudeai 上线 Claude Fable 5，@cursor_ai 确认其在 CursorBench 登顶；@karpathy 与 @arena 同时展示 5B 参数模型实时生成可玩 Rocket League 对战，20 FPS 单卡 B200 完成全场模拟。
@OpenAIDevs 同步推出 GPT-Realtime-2.1-mini，p95 延迟降低 25%，@GeminiApp 则让 Gemini Spark 支持实时事件追踪与自动邮件分析。@MiniMax_AI 确认 M3 将在巴黎 RAISE 周展示开放权重与多模态进展。
@HuggingPapers 发布 DataComp-VLM 基准，证明数据混合优于过滤，8B 模型准确率提升 5.4pp；@fchollet 强调未来 benchmark 必须同时报告成本效率。

deepDives.title: TencentHunyuan Hy3 295B MoE 正式开源
deepDives.summary: Hy3 是当日最大规模开源 MoE 模型，定位 agentic 与 coding 场景，Apache 2.0 许可且免费 API 试用两周。

facts.text: Hy3 295B MoE 模型 Apache 2.0 开源，商用友好
facts.quote: Hy3 is here. 295B MoE. Best in its size class. Rivals trillion-scale flagships.

facts.text: Hy3 原生支持 vLLM，内置 tool-call、reasoning parser 与 MTP speculative decoding
facts.quote: runs natively in vLLM from day 0, with tool-call and reasoning parsers and MTP speculative decoding

bullish.text: strong on coding, tool-calling reliability, reasoning, and 256K long-context

deepDives.title: 5B 模型实时生成 Rocket League 对战
deepDives.summary: Kyutai Labs 用 5B 参数世界模型实现 2v2 Rocket League 全场实时模拟，单卡 B200 达到 20 FPS。

facts.text: 5B 参数模型以 20 FPS 生成完整可玩 Rocket League 对战
facts.quote: Four people just played a full 2v2 Rocket League match inside a neural network... 20 frames a second

facts.text: @emollick 确认该演示为“multiplayer at 20 FPS is pretty neat”
facts.quote: multiplayer at 20 FPS is pretty neat

bullish.text: incredible... models would be able to create these awesome, rich, playable worlds

bullets.text: OpenAI 发布 GPT-Realtime-2.1-mini，推理与工具调用能力与 mini 版同价
bullets.quote: bringing reasoning and tool use to our Realtime mini lineup at the same cost

bullets.text: Gemini Spark 支持实时事件追踪与自动邮件分析
bullets.quote: intelligently track topics and react to events in real time

bullets.text: tinygrad 本地推理达 100 tok/s，单机支持 40 人团队
bullets.quote: ~100 tok/s and one machine is enough for a 40 person org

bullets.text: Gemma 4 在 Apple Silicon 上 MLX 加速近 90%，MTP 默认开启
bullets.quote: nearly 90% faster on Apple Silicon with Ollama using MLX

bullets.text: DataComp-VLM 基准：数据混合使 8B 模型准确率提升 5.4pp
bullets.quote: enabling an 8B model to hit 63.6% accuracy (+5.4pp over FineVision)

bullets.text: @fchollet 呼吁 benchmark 必须同时报告成本效率
bullets.quote: report efficiency scores, e.g. "75% at a cost per task of $10."

topTweets.whyItMatters: Realtime API 向 agentic 方向升级

takeaways: 295B MoE 与 1M 上下文模型已进入生产可部署阶段，vLLM 原生支持成为标配。
世界模型从研究演示转向可玩实时环境，20 FPS 单卡已可支撑多人对战。
benchmark 必须同时报告成本与效率，纯准确率数字已无参考价值。
开源模型在本地推理速度与对齐问题上持续追赶云端，tinygrad 与 MLX 加速值得关注。
Agent 评估工具（LangSmith、WorldModelGym）正从实验走向生产数据闭环。
